subcodes.first_line: O true friend! The written Tablet was received and the longing heart was filled with joy and delight. Praised be God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی لوح مسطور منظور گردید و قلب مشتاق فرح و انبساط یافت الحمد لله آن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
